title: Warehouse Fleet Telemetry: Causal Influence-Map Discovery by Minimum SHD
strategies: emit the empty influence map -- no edges (calibration baseline; SHD == number of true edges)
marginal-correlation thresholding with index-order orientation -- cheap, many transitive false edges and ~random directions
order-0/order-1 PC skeleton pruning + equal-variance topological ordering to orient edges (low-variance source -> high-variance descendant)
score-based / higher-order conditional-independence search or exhaustive DAG scoring for the denser held-out graphs
